Title: Pleasure
Actors: Sofia Kappel, Zelda Morrison, Evelyn Claire
Plot: Ninja Thyberg's debut feature PLEASURE is a journey into the American porn industry and follows 19-year-old Bella from Sweden, who arrives in Los Angeles with the dream of becoming the next big porn star. The film is raw but offers both a human and humorous portrayal of a male-dominated world seen from a female perspective.
Country: Sweden, Netherlands, France, United States, Denmark
